description: 1,500 sampled games from Manning & Horton (2026) novel game population of 883,320

fields.bonus: Natural language description of the bonus rule (used in game prompt)
fields.points: Natural language description of the points rule (used in game prompt)
fields.choice_range: List of integers players can choose from
fields.game_id: Unique integer identifier for the game

params.bonus_size: Points awarded when bonus condition met
params.bonus_rule: One of: gap_low, gap_high, more_than, gap_abs, equal, unequal, sum_even, sum_odd, coord_low, sum_upper, less_upper
params.points_rule: One of: normal_minus_two, normal_minus_one, normal, normal_plus_one, normal_plus_two, costless_minus_two
params.gap: Difference parameter used in gap-based bonus rules
params.example1: Example value used in points rule description
params.example2: Second example value used in points rule description
params.your_example: Example of your choice for prompt context
params.opponent_example: Example of opponent choice for prompt context
